name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approval workflows cause delays in financial operations. We convert raw purchase requisition data into standardized approval workflows instead of manual approval processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient approval workflows for purchase requisitions

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient approval workflows for purchase requisitions
